message: It's strange how, with Tonny standing right in front of me, he suddenly starts to look like a stage set.
Is it just that I'm easily overwhelmed by the atmosphere?
The meals laid out on the table give off a smell that stimulates the appetite.
Speaking of which, I haven't eaten anything yet.
It's pitiful, but it seems I'm getting overwhelmed by the atmosphere and feeling tense.
Even though the two actresses came and made things lively, with Tonny in front of me, I can't shake off this eerie chill.
It doesn't help to worry about the surroundings.
It's impressive how in this style he doesn't come off as annoying; he's truly a stage actor.
With his neatly combed hair, slim face, glinting eyes, and thin lips.
He has a look reminiscent of a reptile.
The first impression is that he’s someone you can't let your guard down around.
That's about it.
He's a man I can't quite figure out what he's thinking.
Tonny.
Hey, we're outsiders here. Let's be friendly as fellow outsiders.
Yeah, right. The only ones unconnected to the movie are you, me, and my companion.
Tonny.
Well, yeah. By the way, what kind of work do you have right now?
No, nothing at the moment.
Tonny.
Huh.
Hmm, so it's a tough economy, huh?
Tonny.
I just happened to have a free day today, but I'm booked every night; I couldn't keep up if I had more bodies.
So having plans every night means you're performing on stage, right?
Tonny.
Completely wrong, detective. I'm on vacation right now. I'm just living it up every night.
That sounds enviable.
Tonny.
Do you really think it's envious?
Tonny.
I like flashy things, you know. So I was expecting today's party to be even more extravagant.
I think it's pretty luxurious already.
Tonny
Hmph. With such a weak guest list...
Tonny
I appreciate the free drinks, but it's simply too dull.
Tonny
Tonight's flowers have finally brightened up this room.
For me, it was a vibrant place since I arrived. But indeed, their appearance has brightened the mood even more.
Tonny
Exactly. However, I was surprised to see them arrive together, not that we had coordinated it.
Tonny
The stage is about to begin. The stage might be the only place where I feel at ease.
That's kind of inspiring.
Tonny
Nah.
It’s not that big of a deal.
Tonny
This country never lacks incidents; maybe we should create a database, eh, Detective?
Tonny
Oh right, speaking of which, there’s been talk about a murder case in the streets. Have you heard about it, Detective?
Which case?
Are you talking about the incident?
Tonny
You know, the guy aiming for girls and taking parts of their bodies.
Ah, was that the incident that happened in Los?
Tonny
Looks like you don't know much about it.
Tonny
I wish there were some heart-stirring events.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
Ｖ＝
Ｎ＝
